headline: Space ETF Near Buy Zone After Winners Planet Labs, AST SpaceMobile Surge
summary: An ETF that tracks the commercial space industry is poised for a breakout.  Among the ETF's top holdings are commercial space companies that include traditional launch services, satellite providers and wireless networks.  Procure Space's top holding, with 5.77% of the ETF's net assets, is the San Francisco-based satellite imaging company Planet Labs.

headline: Garmin Ltd. (NYSE:GRMN) Passes the "Caviar Cruise" Screen for Quality Investing
summary: Garmin exemplifies quality investing with strong profitable growth, high returns on capital, a debt-free balance sheet, and reliable cash flows.
